summary: Tested all 7 LP-WEB-001 cluster pages and email-gated Pre-Op Checklist flow. All pages return HTTP 200, have correct titles, FAQPage schema, disclaimer, and correct CTA architecture. Email capture API works. Thank-you page renders all 4 phases with noindex. One minor SEO issue found: duplicate canonical tags on each cluster page.

issues: Duplicate canonical <link> tags rendered: one from pages/_app.jsx global injection and one from each page's own <Head>. Both point to the same URL so not functionally broken, but violates SEO best practice. Fix: remove canonical from _app.jsx or from individual pages.

action_items: Remove duplicate canonical tag: either remove `<link rel='canonical'>` from /app/frontend/pages/_app.jsx (line 16) OR remove it from all individual cluster page files — not both sources should emit it simultaneously.
critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate canonical tags on all cluster pages due to _app.jsx adding a global canonical (line 16) AND each page's <Head> adding its own canonical. While both point to the same URL (no conflict), duplicate canonicals can confuse crawlers and some SEO audit tools will flag this.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 cluster pages verified: HTTP 200, correct titles, self-referencing canonical (duplicate issue exists), FAQPage schema, regulatory disclaimer. CTA architecture correct: pages 1&7 Primary-only, pages 2&3 Primary+Secondary, pages 4/5/6 mid-article Primary + end Primary + end Secondary. Email-gate on pillar page works, POST /api/checklist/email-capture returns {ok:true}, thank-you page has all 4 checklist phases + noindex + REACH CTA. Sitemap includes all 7 cluster URLs.
